name: Legendary Fire King Ponix
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>真</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>炎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ポニクス
desc: If your monster(s) that was originally FIRE is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Fire King" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. During the next Standby Phase after this card was destroyed and sent to the GY: Add this card from the GY to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Legendary Fire King Ponix" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If your monster(s) that was originally FIRE is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. jp_sets.set: Structure Deck R: Onslaught of the Fire Kings Second Coming of the Eternal Flames' Ruler Pack

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
Returns itself from Graveyard to hand
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
